company: Shanghai United Imaging Healthcare Co., Ltd.
intended_use: The uCT 550 is a computed tomography X-ray system intended to produce cross-sectional images of the body by computer reconstruction of X-ray transmission data taken at different angles and planes and
intended_use_full: The uCT 550 is a computed tomography X-ray system intended to produce cross-sectional images of the body by computer reconstruction of X-ray transmission data taken at different angles and planes and indicated for the whole body, including head, neck, cardiac and vascular.
target_condition: Various CT diagnostic indications across head, chest, abdomen, and vascular applications
ground_truth: FBP (Filtered Back Projection) reconstruction as comparator; IEC 61223-3-5 standard compliance for image quality performance; clinical reader assessment by board-certified U.S. radiologists
other_metrics: Bench testing results: DELTA passed general IQ tests per IEC 61223-3-5; demonstrated better low-contrast detectability (LCD) and lower noise compared to FBP at same scanning dose; demonstrated ability to reduce scanning dose while maintaining similar LCD compared to FBP; demonstrated better high-contrast spatial resolution compared to FBP at same scanning dose. Clinical evaluation: Reader study with five-point scale assessment of noise, image structure fidelity, and overall image quality; mean score of simulated low-dose DELTA images equal or higher than normal-dose FBP; mean score of DELTA better than FBP under same dose.
